crystal.name: crystal diesel

products.subtitle: All products
products.title: Our Fuels
products.description: Quality and reliability at every fuel station.

crystal.name: Crystal Diesel
crystal.description: Refined diesel fuel with crystal-clear purity. Advanced formulation with powerful additives ensuring optimal combustion, smooth engine performance and minimal emissions.

diesel.name: Euro Diesel
diesel.description: Diesel compliant with Euro 6 standards. Ideal for modern fleets and long-distance transport with high efficiency and reduced operating costs.

unloaded.name: Unleaded
unloaded.description: High-quality unleaded petrol for modern engines. Stable combustion, high performance and superior protection of engine components.

lpg.name: LPG
lpg.description: Liquefied petroleum gas for converted vehicles. Up to 50% lower costs than petrol, with reduced emissions and extended range.

footer.text: Wholesale and retail sales, with order-based delivery available nationwide.
